meaning: n.辛苦,苦工,网,罗网,圈套vi.苦干,跋涉,费力地做
examples: I have nothing to offer but blood, toil, tears and sweat.
The finite which admits of progress and sublime toil, they do not think about.
Yet while some 2m foreigners toil here, a fifth of the native workforce is jobless.
Big European telcos toil and gasp under mountains of debt and could be going under next.
